title.ko: 기계 또는 엔진용 가스 흐름 소음기 또는 배기 장치 일반; 내연기관용 가스 흐름 소음기 또는 배기 장치 (차량 추진 장치의 가스 배기 관련 장치 B60K13/00, 내연기관에 특히 적합하거나, 장착된 연소 공기 흡입 소음기 F02M35/00; 소음 차단 또는 감쇠 일반 G10K11/16)
title.en: GAS-FLOW SILENCERS OR EXHAUST APPARATUS FOR MACHINES OR ENGINES IN GENERAL; GAS-FLOW SILENCERS OR EXHAUST APPARATUS FOR INTERNAL-COMBUSTION ENGINES (arrangements in connection with gas exhaust of propulsion units in vehicles B60K0013000000;combustion-air intake silencers specially adapted for, or arranged on, internal-combustion engines F02M0035000000;protecting against, or damping, noise in general G10K0011160000)

definition.ko: 클라스 F01 앞의 주, 특히 주(3)에 주의할 것

title.ko: 소음 제거 방법에 특징이 있는 소음 제거 장치
title.en: Silencing apparatus characterised by method of silencing
by using resonance
having sound-absorbing materials in resonance chambers
by using interference effect

title.ko: 연료 조절(throttling) 및 선회류를 통한 배기 에너지 소음을 저감하는 것
title.en: by reducing exhaust energy by throttling or whirling
in combination with sound-absorbing materials

title.ko: 나선형상의 채널을 이용하는 것(1/10이 우선; 사이클론 B04C)
title.en: using spirally- or helically-shaped channels (F01N0001100000 takes precedence;cyclones B04C)
by adding air to exhaust gases
by using movable parts
having rotary movement

title.ko: 진동부재를 사용하는 것(탄성벽 부재의 형태를 가진 것 1/22)
title.en: having oscillating or vibrating movement (the parts being resilient walls F01N0001220000)
the parts being resilient walls
by using sound-absorbing materials (F01N0001040000, F01N0001060000, F01N0001100000, F01N0001140000, F01N0001160000 take precedence)

title.ko: 배기가스 정화, 무해화 또는 기타 처리 수단을 갖춘 배기 또는 소음 제거 장치 (전기 제어 F01N9/00; 배기가스 처리 장치용 모니터링 또는 진단 장치 F01N11/00)
title.en: Exhaust or silencing apparatus having means for purifying, rendering innocuous, or otherwise treating exhaust (electric control F01N0009000000;monitoring or diagnostic devices for exhaust-gas treatment apparatus F01N0011000000)
by means of electric or electrostatic separators

title.ko: 배기를 냉각하기 위한 것, 또는 배기의 고체성분을 제거하기 위한 것(전기 혹은 정전기 분리기를 이용하는 것 3/01)
title.en: for cooling, or for removing solid constituents of, exhaust (by means of electric or electrostatic separators F01N0003010000)
by means of filters
characterised by specially adapted filtering structure, e.g. honeycomb, mesh or fibrous
using means for regenerating the filters, e.g. by burning trapped particles
using fuel burner or by adding fuel to exhaust
using electric or magnetic heating
using microwaves
by adding non-fuel substances to exhaust
having means for by-passing filters, e.g. when clogged or during cold engine start
during filter regeneration only
in combination with other devices
with catalytic reactors
by means of inertial or centrifugal separators, e.g. associated with agglomerators
by means of perforated plates defining expansion chambers associated with condensation and collection chambers
by means of liquids

title.ko: 공기에 의한 것, 예. 배기가스와 공기를 혼합하여 (배기가스에 공기를 첨가하여 작동하는 소음기 F01N1/14; 배기가스 중 유해성분의 열 또는 촉매 변환을 위한 추가 공기 공급 장치 F01N3/30)
title.en: by means of air, e.g. by mixing exhaust with air (silencers working by addition of air to exhaust F01N0001140000;arrangements for the supply of additional air for the thermal or catalytic conversion of noxious components of exhaust F01N0003300000)
for extinguishing sparks

title.ko: 무해를 시키기 위한 것(전기 혹은 정전기를 이용한 분리 3/01; 화학적인 면에 특징이 있는 것 B01D 53/92)
title.en: for rendering innocuous (using electric or electrostatic separators F01N0003010000;chemical aspects B01D0053920000)

title.ko: 배기가스의 유해성분을 열 또는 촉매 변환하여
title.en: by thermal or catalytic conversion of noxious components of exhaust

title.ko: 조작의 방법에 특징을 갖는 것; 제어
title.en: characterised by methods of operation; Control

title.ko: 촉매 전환에 특히 적합한 것 (F01N3/22가 우선)
title.en: specially adapted for catalytic conversion (F01N0003220000 takes precedence)
Control of additional air supply only, e.g. using by-passes or variable air pump drives

title.ko: 변환장치의 구조적인 면에 특징을 갖는 것(촉매반응장치와 결합하여 고체성분을 분리하는 것 3/035)
title.en: characterised by constructional aspects of converting apparatus (filtering in combination with catalytic reactors F01N0003035000)
Construction of thermal reactors
Construction of catalytic reactors

title.ko: 첨가 공기의 공급을 위한 장치(조정, 예. 바이패스 혹은 가변의 공기펌프구동수단에 의하는 것 3/22)
title.en: Arrangements for supply of additional air (control, e.g. using by-passes or variable air pump drives, F01N0003220000)

title.ko: 공기펌프를 사용하는 것(제트식 공기펌프를 사용하는 것 3/34; 펌프일반 F04)
title.en: using air pumps (using jet air pumps F01N0003340000;pumps in general F04)
using air conduits or jet air pumps, e.g. near the engine exhaust port
Arrangements for supply of additional fuel
Arrangements for igniting

title.ko: 배기 에너지에 의해 이익을 얻는 장치와 결합되거나 관련된 배기 또는 소음 장치 (충전을 위한 배기 시스템에서 배기 가스의 운동 또는 파동 에너지를 사용하는 것 F02B)
title.en: Exhaust or silencing apparatus combined or associated with devices profiting by exhaust energy (using kinetic or wave energy of exhaust gases in exhaust systems for charging F02B)
the devices using heat
the devices using kinetic energy

title.ko: 배기가스 처리장치의 전기적 제어 (배기가스 처리장치에 대한 감시 또는 진단 장치 F01N11/00; 2 이상의 연소기관 기능의 공동 전기 제어 F02D43/00)
title.en: Electrical control of exhaust gas treating apparatus (monitoring or diagnostic devices for exhaust-gas treatment apparatus F01N0011000000;conjoint electrical control of two or more combustion engine functions F02D0043000000)
Monitoring or diagnostic devices for exhaust-gas treatment apparatus
Exhaust or silencing apparatus characterised by constructional features
having two or more separate silencers in series
having two or more silencers in parallel, e.g. having interconnections for multi-cylinder engines
specially adapted for star-arrangement of cylinders, e.g. exhaust manifolds
Other arrangements or adaptations of exhaust conduits
of exhaust manifolds
specially adapted for submerged exhausting
having thermal insulation
Selection of particular materials
Construction facilitating manufacture, assembly or disassembly
having flared outlets, e.g. of fish-tail shape
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
